scripts.build:smoke: npm run build && npm run smoke:artifact
scripts.smoke:e2e: playwright test tests/e2e/room-corridors.spec.ts --grep "syncs a committed note to a second browser context|refreshes an active room while shared live state stays available|attaches a same-browser second tab to the active room session|recovers committed note create through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery without durable snapshot|recovers committed note delete through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery without durable snapshot|recovers committed note move through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery|recovers saved note text through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery|recovers committed note resize through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery|settles same-browser reopen through durable catch-up when the durable textCards slice is ahead"
scripts.smoke:e2e:headed: playwright test tests/e2e/room-corridors.spec.ts --headed --grep "syncs a committed note to a second browser context|refreshes an active room while shared live state stays available|attaches a same-browser second tab to the active room session|recovers committed note create through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery without durable snapshot|recovers committed note delete through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery without durable snapshot|recovers committed note move through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery|recovers saved note text through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery|recovers committed note resize through same-browser IndexedDB local recovery|settles same-browser reopen through durable catch-up when the durable textCards slice is ahead"
